import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.size'] = 8

# Create the Evidence Matrix table as a figure
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 8))
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title('Evidence Matrix: AGR3 Core Function Hypothesis', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

columns = ['Citation', 'Evidence Type', 'Direction', 'Claim Tested', 'Key Finding', 'Context', 'Confidence']
data = [
    ['PMID:25751668\nBonser 2015', 'Mutant\nphenotype', 'Supports', 'AGR3 required\nfor CBF regulation', 'KO mice: 20% lower basal\nCBF, 35% lower ATP-stim', 'Mouse trachea\nex vivo', 'High\n(single study)'],
    ['PMID:25751668\nBonser 2015', 'Mutant\nphenotype', 'Supports', 'Calcium-dependence\nof AGR3 effect', 'No CBF difference\nin Ca²⁺-free perfusion', 'Mouse trachea\nCa²⁺-free', 'High\n(single study)'],
    ['PMID:25751668\nBonser 2015', 'Mutant\nphenotype', 'Supports', 'AGR3 needed for\nmucociliary clearance', 'Impaired clearance\nin AGR3-/- airways', 'Mouse trachea\nex vivo', 'Moderate'],
    ['PMID:25751668\nBonser 2015', 'Localization', 'Supports', 'AGR3 in ciliated\ncells only', 'Restricted to ciliated cells,\nnot mucous cells', 'Mouse & human\nairway', 'High'],
    ['PMID:29969106\nNguyen 2018', 'Structural', 'Qualifies', 'AGR3 is a PDI\nfamily member', 'DCQYS motif lacks\ncanonical CXXC', 'Crystal structure\n1.83 Å (PDB:3PH9)', 'High'],
    ['PMID:12592373\nFletcher 2003', 'Interaction\n(Y2H)', 'Qualifies', 'AGR3 binds\ndystroglycan', 'Y2H: AGR3 binds\nDAG1 and C4.4a', 'Yeast\ntwo-hybrid', 'Low-Moderate\n(no validation)'],
    ['PMID:27068954\nAppenzeller-\nHerzog 2016', 'Review\n(mechanism)', 'Supports\n(model)', 'ER oxidoreductases\nregulate Ca²⁺ flux', 'Ero1α, ERp57 regulate\nIP3R and SERCA', 'ER redox-Ca²⁺\nreview', 'Moderate\n(analogous)'],
    ['PMID:31611954\nObacz 2019', 'Functional\nassay', 'Competing', 'AGR3 is secreted\nin cancer', 'eAGR3 regulates\nmigration via Src', 'Breast cancer\ncell lines', 'Low relevance\n(cancer context)'],
    ['PMID:22361111\nGray 2012', 'Expression/\nlocalization', 'Qualifies', 'AGR3 in ovarian\ncancer', 'AGR3 cytosolic in\n4 ovarian ca subtypes', 'Ovarian cancer\nIHC', 'Low relevance\n(cancer context)'],
]

colors = []
for row in data:
    direction = row[2]
    if 'Supports' in direction:
        colors.append('#d4edda')
    elif 'Qualifies' in direction:
        colors.append('#fff3cd')
    elif 'Competing' in direction:
        colors.append('#f8d7da')
    else:
        colors.append('#ffffff')

table = ax.table(cellText=data, colLabels=columns, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(7)
table.scale(1, 2.2)

# Color the cells
for i, row in enumerate(data):
    for j in range(len(columns)):
        cell = table[i+1, j]
        cell.set_facecolor(colors[i])
        cell.set_edgecolor('gray')

# Header styling
for j in range(len(columns)):
    cell = table[0, j]
    cell.set_facecolor('#343a40')
    cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

plt.savefig('agr3_evidence_matrix.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence matrix figure saved.")
